summary: The diff implements most requirements from the build request. The core structure is present: entry screen, parchment scroll with wooden handles, letter content, Google Fonts loading, and page title. However, there are some gaps — notably the candle emoji decorations on scroll handles are not confirmed in the visible CSS/HTML, the paper-fibers texture URL from transparenttextures.com is not confirmed in the truncated CSS, and the highlight paragraph styling details need verification. The footer attribution was not requested. Overall implementation is largely complete with a few unverified details due to CSS truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wooden roll handles must have 🕯️ candle emoji decorations at each end
missing_requirements.reason: The ScrollLetter.tsx renders .scroll-roll divs but no candle emoji content is visible in the component markup or CSS pseudo-elements. The CSS is truncated before the scroll-roll styles are fully shown, so no ::before/::after candle content is confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Parchment background must use paper-fibers texture from transparenttextures.com as an overlay
missing_requirements.reason: The index.css is truncated and the parchment-body background-image rule referencing transparenttextures.com cannot be confirmed from the available diff content.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution added linking to caffeine.ai
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any footer attribution. App.tsx includes a footer-attribution div with a caffeine.ai link, which was not requested.
